title: SEATTLE PUBLIC LIBRARY - CENTRAL LIBRARY - Yelp
content: It's just amazing! So many floors and so much to marvel at. There's not only history in the books on the shelves but they have it built into the entire place!

title: Discover Seattle's Best Reading Room with Skyline Views - TikTok
content: The best reading room view in Seattle? The 10th floor of the Central Library. Floor-to-ceiling windows + downtown skyline = the perfect spot

title: The Suzzallo Graduate Reading Room at the University of ... - Reddit
content: I loved it there. I still ended up wearing earplugs though. It was so quiet that the coughing, typing, pencil scratches all drove me nuts.
